summary:
🌅 MORNING BRIEF — Monday, April 13, 2026

🌤 Weather
- High 79–82, low 72–73, rain risk low around 15–20%, breezy onshore wind with rip current risk along the coast

📅 Calendar
- Today’s events: Google Calendar unavailable
- Constraints: No calendar-based constraints confirmed

📥 Inbox
Primary:
- Gmail unavailable

Updates:
- Gmail unavailable

🧠 Intelligence Brief
Top Signals:
- Anthropic is pushing Claude Cowork deeper into org-wide autonomous workflow deployment
- OpenAI leadership is explicitly refocusing on Anthropic and coding, cutting “side quests”
- Atlassian is embedding third-party agents directly into Confluence workflows
- Anthropic expanded compute capacity with Google and Broadcom to meet agent demand

Why It Matters:
- The market is rewarding workflow ownership, not generic chat, which fits BBS’s automation wedge
- Agent OS differentiation needs orchestration, deployment, and operator leverage, not just model access
- This is a good moment to ship proof-of-work and outbound while incumbents are still translating capability into usable ops

📊 Task Pulse
Focus:
- Clarify BBS offer + ICP + CTA, then turn it into homepage copy around the med spa lead-to-booked-consult offer
- Build the 25-prospect BBS target list
- Send the first 5 BBS outreach messages

Pressure:
- Overdue today: Update website, BBS outreach, 2025 Taxes
- Deadlines within 48h: MS-01 migration (Apr 15), Mirage Order Entry SOP (Apr 15), ClawBot proactive pass (Apr 16)

Drift:
- Agent OS backlog items A1/A2/A3, B1/B2, D1/D2, and Core loop proof demo have been untouched since Mar 30
- Mirage SOP, blog post, resume, and Google Certificate have seen little or no movement since Apr 6

🎯 The Read
- The real bottleneck is no longer deciding what BBS is, it is converting the med spa offer into a live page and first outbound touches before build work crowds it out

🎯 Today’s Edge
- Finish the offer page and CTA first, then reuse that language immediately in outreach so website and prospectin…

Morning brief posted to Discord (2 messages). Here's what was delivered:
